name: SUPERIOR OPHTHALMIC VEIN THROMBOSIS
dominant_finding: filling defect in superior ophthalmic vein
distribution: filling defect in superior ophthalmic vein
discriminating_features: filling defect in superior ophthalmic vein
enlargement of both superior ophthalmic veins + cavernous sinus

general: filling defect in superior ophthalmic vein
enlargement of both superior ophthalmic veins + cavernous sinus

clinical.Cx: vision loss, thrombosis of cavernous sinus, sepsis
